mapper.select: SELECT A.orgn_id , A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.doc_seq , A.safety_health_goal , A.detail_goal_method , A.hr_id , (select Z.hr_nm from esg.tb_hr_info Z where Z.hr_id = A.hr_id ) AS hr_nm , (select Z.orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info Z where Z.orgn_id = A.orgn_id ) AS orgn_nm , B.revised_dt , B.enacted_dt , A.required_resource , A.evaluation_method , A.remark , A.use_yn , action_doc_type , action_doc_no , action_doc_seq , action_doc_detail_seq , A.action_schedule1 , A.action_schedule2 , A.action_schedule3 , A.action_schedule4 , A.action_schedule5 , A.action_schedule6 , A.action_schedule7 , A.action_schedule8 , A.action_schedule9 , A.action_schedule10 , A.action_schedule11 , A.action_schedule12 , taco.company_objective , taop.action_objective , tadp.detail_plan , tadi.detail_item , tadp.detail_item_id , A.comp_id , CASE WHEN tom.orgn_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS action_orgn_yn FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives B ON A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_objective_plan taop ON A.write_year = taop.write_year AND A.action_doc_type = taop.doc_type AND A.action_doc_no = taop.doc_no AND A.action_doc_seq = taop.doc_seq AND A.comp_id = taop.comp_id LEFT join esg.tb_action_company_objective taco ON taco.comp_objective_id = taop.comp_objective_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan tadp ON A.write_year = tadp.write_year AND A.action_doc_type = tadp.doc_type AND A.action_doc_no = tadp.doc_no AND A.action_doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq AND A.action_doc_detail_seq = tadp.doc_detail_seq AND A.comp_id = tadp.comp_id AND taop.doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_item tadi ON tadi.detail_item_id = tadp.detail_item_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_map tom ON tom.target_type = taop.doc_type AND tom.target_id = A.write_year || A.action_doc_no || A.action_doc_seq AND tom.use_yn = 'Y' AND tom.orgn_id = A.orgn_id WHERE A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} ORDER BY A.doc_seq DESC, A.use_yn = 'N' ASC;

SELECT toi.*, thimH.hr_id as head_hr_id, hrH.hr_nm as head_hr_nm, thimS.hr_id as second_hr_id, sf.file_id as primary_id, sf1.file_id as secondary_id, hrS.hr_nm as second_hr_nm, (select count(*) from esg.tb_hr_info where orgn_id = toi.orgn_id) as result_cnt -- 총인원 수 FROM esg.tb_orgn_info toi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_incharge_map thimH on thimH.target_id = toi.orgn_id AND thimH.target_type = 'orgn' AND thimH.gubun = 'HEAD' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hrH on hrH.hr_id = thimH.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_incharge_map thimS on thimS.target_id = toi.orgn_id AND thimS.target_type = 'orgn' AND thimS.gubun = '2ND' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hrS on hrS.hr_id = thimS.hr_id -- 파일 location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = thimH.hr_id and sf.target_type='hrImg' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf1 on sf1.target_id = thimS.hr_id and sf1.target_type='hrImg' WHERE 1=1 AND toi.comp_id = #{compId} AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives B WHERE B.WRITE_YEAR= #{writeYear} AND toi.ORGN_ID = B.orgn_id ) ORDER BY toi.use_yn DESC, toi.ord_seq;

SELECT tmd.* FROM esg.tb_task_manager tm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_task_manager_detail tmd ON tm.comp_id = tmd.comp_id AND tm.user_id = tmd.user_id AND tm.task_year = tmd.task_year AND tm.task_month = tmd.task_month AND tm.task_day = tmd.task_day AND tm.task_seq = tmd.task_seq WHERE tm.req_info_key = #{reqInfoKey} AND tmd.task_detail_user_id != (select user_id from esg.tb_hr_info where hr_id = #{hrId}) AND tmd.cancel_dt is null AND tmd.complete_dt is null

SELECT (SELECT Z.orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_info Z WHERE Z.orgn_id = A.orgn_id ) AS orgn_nm , A.revised_dt , A.enacted_dt , B.signature as writer , C.signature as reviewer , D.signature as approver FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info B ON B.target_type = A.doc_type AND B.target_id = A.write_year||A.doc_no AND B.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info C ON C.target_type = A.doc_type AND C.target_id = A.write_year||A.doc_no AND C.param = 'reviewer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info D ON D.target_type = A.doc_type AND D.target_id = A.write_year||A.doc_no AND D.param = 'approver' WHERE A.orgn_id = #{orgnId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo};

SELECT A.orgn_id , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.doc_seq , A.safety_health_goal , A.detail_goal_method , A.hr_id , (select Z.hr_nm from esg.tb_hr_info Z where Z.hr_id = A.hr_id ) AS hr_nm , (select Z.orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info Z where Z.orgn_id = A.orgn_id ) AS orgn_nm , A.required_resource , A.evaluation_method , COALESCE(REMARK,'') AS remark , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule1 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule1 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule1 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule2 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule2 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule2 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule3 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule3 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule3 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule4 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule4 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule4 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule5 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule5 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule5 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule6 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule6 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule6 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule7 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule7 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule7 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule8 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule8 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule8 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule9 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule9 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule9 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule10 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule10 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule10 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule11 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule11 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule11 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule12 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule12 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule12 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail A WHERE A.orgn_id = #{orgnId} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.doc_seq = #{docSeq} ORDER BY A.doc_seq, A.use_yn = 'N';

SELECT A.orgn_id , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.doc_seq , A.safety_health_goal , A.detail_goal_method , A.hr_id , (select Z.hr_nm from esg.tb_hr_info Z where Z.hr_id = A.hr_id ) AS hr_nm , (select Z.orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info Z where Z.orgn_id = A.orgn_id ) AS orgn_nm , A.required_resource , A.evaluation_method , COALESCE(REMARK,'') AS remark , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule1 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule1 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule1 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule2 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule2 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule2 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule3 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule3 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule3 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule4 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule4 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule4 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule5 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule5 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule5 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule6 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule6 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule6 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule7 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule7 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule7 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule8 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule8 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule8 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule9 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule9 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule9 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule10 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule10 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule10 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule11 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule11 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule11 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule12 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule12 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule12 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail A WHERE A.orgn_id = #{orgnId} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.doc_seq = #{docSeq} ORDER BY A.doc_seq, A.use_yn = 'N';

SELECT A.orgn_id , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.doc_seq , A.safety_health_goal , A.detail_goal_method , A.hr_id , (select Z.hr_nm from esg.tb_hr_info Z where Z.hr_id = A.hr_id ) AS hr_nm , (select Z.orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info Z where Z.orgn_id = A.orgn_id ) AS orgn_nm , A.required_resource , A.evaluation_method , COALESCE(REMARK,'') AS remark , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule1 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule1 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule1 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule2 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule2 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule2 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule3 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule3 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule3 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule4 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule4 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule4 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule5 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule5 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule5 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule6 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule6 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule6 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule7 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule7 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule7 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule8 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule8 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule8 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule9 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule9 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule9 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule10 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule10 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule10 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule11 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule11 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule11 , CASE WHEN A.action_schedule12 IS NULL OR A.action_schedule12 = '' THEN '' ELSE '●' END AS action_schedule12 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail A WHERE A.orgn_id = #{orgnId} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} ORDER BY A.doc_seq, A.use_yn = 'N';
